creator: jseger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

There is probably some old kerberos lib or include file somewhere on your system that 
xscreensaver's configure is identifying, probably an old aout lib. 

Try a 'find / -name "*krb*"' and see if anything turns up.  If this is NOT the problem, 
let me know and we can reexamine it.
